desc_1: Hey! This is me siya. 14 years old design engineer who loves to design and build. I built things out of curiosity and passion.

link_items.label: Everything about me
link_items.content:
I like working on internet products, tinkering with code, and learning by building things from scratch.

Most of my work starts with curiosity, then turns into prototypes, tools, and side projects.

link_items.label: Apps and domains I have built
link_items.content:
I build apps, experiments, and small products across the web.
